reference: Hypothyroidism definitely causes problems in conception. We need to check your Thyroid Stimulating Hormone level, and it should be less than two point five before pregnancy to ensure a safe journey throughout pregnancy. In the meantime, we need to assess both the husband and wife to determine whether there are any other additional problems that prevent pregnancy. If found, we need to treat that problem as well. Good luck.
text: Hypothyroidism definitely causes problems in conception. We need to check your thyroid simulating hormone level, and it should be less than two point five before pregnancy to ensure a safe journey throughout pregnancy. In the meantime, we need to assess both the husband and wife to determine whether there are any other additional problems that prevent pregnancy. If found, we need to treat that problem as well. Good luck.
